user.title: Add RFWC5 Keypad
user.description: Select your Eaton RFWC5 Z-Wave keypad and its Indicator sensor entity.

button.title: Configure Button {button_number}
button.description: Set the label and what action this button controls.

abort.no_zwave_devices: No Z-Wave JS devices found. Ensure Z-Wave JS is set up.
abort.already_configured: This keypad has already been configured.

error.invalid_entity: The selected entity does not belong to the chosen Z-Wave device.
